options.name: -H
options.description: specifies the style of bump assignment as horizontal

options.name: -V
options.description: specifies the style of bump assignment as vertical

options.name: -bumps
options.description: specifies the bumps to be assigned ((bump)+, required)

options.name: -checkerboard
options.description: specifies the style of bump assignment as checkerboard

options.name: -connectType
options.description: {ioring corering stripe iopin} specifies the bump connect type

options.name: -square
options.description: It specifies the width and height of square of checkerboard.
